San Jose crime family.description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in San Jose, California, founded in the early 1940s by Onofrio Sciortino. The family engaged in loansharking, gambling, counterfeiting, prostitution, and extortion, with around 25 made members in the 1960s. It was led by Joseph Cerrito and later Angelo Marino, and was active until the 2000s.

descriptions: Bonanno family is allied with San Jose crime family per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... San Jose crime family

descriptions: San Jose family was represented by the Chicago Outfit on the Commission.
edges.evidence_quote: San Jose crime family

descriptions: Hells Angels associated with San Jose crime family in criminal ventures.
edges.evidence_quote: and have associated in criminal ventures with the ... San Jose ... crime families

descriptions: The San Jose crime family is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: San Jose crime family

descriptions: James Lanza made solid ties with San Jose crime family boss Joseph Cerrito.
edges.evidence_quote: Lanza also made solid ties with other bosses, including Joseph Civello of Dallas and Joseph Cerrito of San Jose.

descriptions: The San Jose crime family is a constituent family within the American Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The San Jose family was one of the two families that controlled organized crime in San Jose, within the nationwide criminal organization known as the American Mafia (or "La Cosa Nostra")

descriptions: Joseph Cerrito, boss of the San Jose family, met with a Bonanno family member, suggesting a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1964, he was spotted meeting Bonanno crime family former underboss Frank Garofalo at a hotel in Palermo, Sicily.

descriptions: The Chicago Outfit is listed as an ally of the San Jose crime family in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Dallas crime family , Los Angeles crime family , San Francisco crime family , Hells Angels MC

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Dallas crime family , Los Angeles crime family , San Francisco crime family , Hells Angels MC

edges.evidence_quote: Marino was close with ... Los Angeles consigliere and FBI informant Frank Bompensiero.

descriptions: Angelo Marino's father was a member of the Pittsburgh family, indicating a familial link between the families.
edges.evidence_quote: His father, Salvatore, a longtime member of the Pittsburgh crime family, handed the company to Marino.

descriptions: Angelo Marino, boss of the San Jose family, had close ties with the San Francisco family boss.
edges.evidence_quote: Marino was close with San Francisco crime family boss James Lanza

edges.target: North Jersey faction of the Bruno family
descriptions: The North Jersey faction was a part of the Bruno family (Philadelphia crime family).
edges.evidence_quote: Bocchino was initially a member of the North Jersey faction of the Bruno family and was in the Newark crew headed by Antonio Caponigro during the 1960s and 1970s.

Avenues (gang).description: The Avenues is a Mexican/Mexican American criminal street gang based in Los Angeles County, California. Originally a social club founded by the Flores brothers in the 1940s, it evolved into a violent criminal organization involved in drug trafficking, murder, and hate crimes. The gang is under the control of the Mexican Mafia in prison and has an estimated 800 members. It remains active as of the present day.

descriptions: Avenues is a rival of 18th Street.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Avenues, Mara Salvatrucha, Playboys, Santa Monica 13, Temple Street (gang), Vineland Boys, Florencia 13, Bloods, Black P. Stones (Jungles)

descriptions: The Avenues are rivals with the 18th Street gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , Satanas

descriptions: The Avenues clashed with Cypress Park Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: The Avenues also began to clash with neighboring gangs, such as Highland Park 13, Cypress Park Boys, Toonerville , Frog Town Rifa and Thee Rascals, in an attempt to assert their dominance.

edges.evidence_quote: The Avenues also began to clash with neighboring gangs, such as Highland Park 13, Cypress Park Boys, Toonerville , Frog Town Rifa and Thee Rascals, in an attempt to assert their dominance.

descriptions: The Avenues are under the direct control of the Mexican Mafia in prison.
edges.evidence_quote: The Avenues, like most Mexican gangs in Los Angeles, are under the direct control of the Mexican Mafia when sent to State, County, or Federal prisons.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , Satanas

edges.evidence_quote: The Avenues also began to clash with neighboring gangs, such as Highland Park 13, Cypress Park Boys, Toonerville , Frog Town Rifa and Thee Rascals, in an attempt to assert their dominance.

edges.evidence_quote: the Mongols began recruiting members from Sureño street gangs, including the Avenues and 18th Street , during the 1990s.

descriptions: Satanas has a rivalry with Avenues.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Avenues , Bahala Na Gang

descriptions: The Avenues gang originally derived from Varrio White Fence.
edges.evidence_quote: gangs such as the Avenues (AVES), Frogtown (FTR), Hazard (BH), and other sections in the area originally derived from Varrio White Fence.

descriptions: Clan Ferlito-Pillera and Clan Santapaola were in a bloody conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Lo scontro tra i clan Ferlito-Pillera e Santapaola fu il più cruento della storia della mafia catanese

Solntsevskaya Bratva.description: Russian crime syndicate founded in the late 1980s in the Solntsevo District of Moscow by Sergei Mikhailov and Viktor Averin. It controls transport hubs and engages in racketeering, drug trafficking, money laundering, and other crimes. The group has expanded internationally and maintains alliances with various criminal organizations.

descriptions: The Chechen mafia came into conflict with the Solntsevskaya bratva.
edges.evidence_quote: This brought them into conflict with the Slavic gangs, including the Solntsevskaya bratva and the Orekhovskaya gang

descriptions: The alliance between Orekhovskaya and Solntsevskaya ended by 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: However, by 1997 the alliance had split and Todorov was again running an independent gang.

descriptions: Orekhovskaya merged with Solntsevskaya bratva in 1989 to fight Chechen mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 the gang merged with the Solntsevskaya bratva to combat the growing threat of Chechen mafia gangs.

descriptions: Remnants of Orekhovskaya were absorbed by Solntsevskaya Bratva after the split.
edges.evidence_quote: what was left of the gang was swallowed up by the Solntsevskaya Bratva

descriptions: The Semion Mogilevich organization's business is often connected with the Solntsevskaya Bratva.
edges.evidence_quote: Its business is often connected with that of the Solntsevskaya Bratva and the Vyacheslav Ivankov Organization.

descriptions: Russian mafia formalized collaboration with Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2008 viene formalizzata la collaborazione fra mafia russa e Cosa nostra, 'ndrangheta e camorra.

descriptions: 'Ndrangheta is listed as a business partner of Solntsevskaya Bratva in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Orekhovskaya gang (defunct) , Bulgarian mafia , Serbian mafia , Business partnerships with: , Colombian cartels , Chinese Triads , Sicilian Mafia , Camorra , 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Chechen mafia challenged Solntsevskaya's dominance, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: But by the early 1990s, the Solntsevo's dominance was challenged by the Chechen mafia.

descriptions: Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan brokered links between Solntsevskaya and Colombian cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: The organization is also involved in the international cocaine trade, with its links to Colombian drug cartels brokered by the Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan.

descriptions: Doktor's Bratva is a subdivision of Solntsevskaya Bratva, with an alliance between them.
edges.evidence_quote: Doktor's Bratvavor Is a subdivision of the Solntsevskaya Bratva, being independently operated and headed by the notorious Doktor Spatz, after his refusal to submit to Odenussa's order, and an agreement was reached to form an alliance between the groups.

descriptions: Mogilevich's associate met with Genovese crime family members to arrange a toxic waste dumping scheme.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1998, an FBI informant told the bureau that one of Mogilevich's chief lieutenants in Los Angeles met two Russians from New York City with Genovese crime family ties to broker a scheme to dump American toxic waste in Russia or Ukraine.

descriptions: Solntsevskaya allied with Orekhovskaya gang against the Chechen mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Together with the Orekhovskaya gang and other Slavic mobs, the Solntsevo made an alliance to drive the Chechens out.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Orekhovskaya gang (defunct) , Bulgarian mafia , Serbian mafia , Business partnerships with: , Colombian cartels , Chinese Triads , Sicilian Mafia , Camorra , 'Ndrangheta

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Solntsevskaya Bratva

descriptions: Harlem Spartans has a rivalry with 410, expressed through diss tracks and physical violence.
edges.evidence_quote: The group is known for its rivalry with Brixton -based group 410.

'Ndrina Romeo.description: The Romeo 'ndrina, also known as Stacchi, is a 'Ndrangheta clan based in San Luca, Italy. It is allied with the Nirta (La Maggiore) and Pelle clans. The clan has been involved in international drug trafficking, money laundering, and other criminal activities, with operations spanning Italy, the Netherlands, Germany, Belgium, Colombia, and Brazil. Several members have been arrested in major operations such as Puerto Liberado and European 'ndrangheta connection.

descriptions: Belcastro and Romeo are allied as a single faction in the faida.
edges.evidence_quote: si apre una nuova faida tra i Belcastro-Romeo (Giuseppe Belcastro e Tommaso Romeo) che vogliono distaccarsi dai D'Agostino

descriptions: Codispoti are allies of Romeo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Nirta-Scalzone (con cui hanno anche dei legami parentali), i Romeo

descriptions: Gioffrè, Santaiti, and Romeo are the dominant 'ndrine of Seminara, acting together.
edges.evidence_quote: I Gioffrè , insieme ai Santaiti e ai Romeo, sono le 'ndrine egemoni di Seminara.

descriptions: The Giorgi 'ndrina is associated with the Romeo 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme ai Pelle , i Romeo e i Morabito

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with the Romeo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Codispoti (con cui hanno dei legami parentali), dei Vottari , detti Frunzu e cioè i Pelle , dei Giorgi e dei Romeo .

descriptions: Mammoliti and Romeo are related.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mammoliti sono una 'ndrina potente di Oppido Mamertina e Castellace quali fanno capo i Rugolo , i Nava, i Cosoleto, i Luppino e i Romeo con loro imparentate.

descriptions: Romeo and Giorgi jointly ran an international drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 luglio 2014 nell'operazione della Guardia di Finanza Puerto Liberado viene sgominato un traffico di droga internazionale a capo delle famiglie Romeo e Giorgi

edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con le cosche dei Nirta ( La Maggiore ) e dei Pelle .

edges.evidence_quote: Sebastiano Romeo , secondo Francesco Fonti viene coinvolto insieme alla Banda della Magliana nella ricerca di Aldo Moro .

descriptions: Infobox lists Storm Troopers as a rival of Black Power.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mongrel Mob , Bloods , Storm Troopers

descriptions: Lo Presti had business relations with the Inzerillo-Spatola-Gambino family of Palermo.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto rapporti di affari con la Famiglia Inzerillo -Spatola-Gambino di Palermo , attraverso la quale strinse alleanze anche oltreoceano con la Famiglia Gambino di New York e con le famiglie della 'Ndrangheta in Canada degli Zito , dei Commisso , dei Racco, degli Stalteri a Toronto e dei Cotroni a Montréal .

Aryan Nations.description: Aryan Nations is a North American neo-Nazi organization founded in the 1970s by Richard Girnt Butler, originally based in Hayden Lake, Idaho. It adheres to Christian Identity doctrine, a white supremacist interpretation of Christianity. The group was classified as a terrorist threat by the FBI in 2001 and described as the first nationwide terrorist network in the US and Canada. After Butler's death in 2004, the organization fragmented into several splinter groups.

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood is affiliated with Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: The Aryan Brotherhood is affiliated with a network of smaller peckerwood gangs, such as the Nazi Lowriders and Public Enemy No. 1, and the national hate-based organization Aryan Nations.

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood is affiliated with Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: La Hermandad Aria está afiliada a una red de pandillas conformados por hombres blancos como ... la organización nacional Naciones Arias.

descriptions: August Kreis III attempted to form an alliance between Aryan Nations and al Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2005, Kreis received media attention because he attempted to form an Aryan Nations–al Qaeda alliance.

descriptions: Aryan Nations Revival is a splinter group of Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: Based in New York, and led by Jay Faber, Aryan Nations Revival became one of the more well-known splinter groups.

descriptions: Aryan Nations was founded as the paramilitary wing of the Church of Jesus Christ–Christian.
edges.evidence_quote: After moving to Idaho, Butler founded Aryan Nations as a paramilitary wing of the church

descriptions: Crusaders of Yahweh is a splinter group of Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: The most successful splinter group was likely Paul Mullet's Crusaders of Yahweh, which had branches in 17 states.

edges.target: Holy Order of the Brotherhood of the Phineas Priesthood
descriptions: The Holy Order of the Brotherhood of the Phineas Priesthood was considered the enforcement/terrorist wing of Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: The government concluded that the Holy Order of the Brotherhood of the Phineas Priesthood was the enforcement/terrorist wing of Aryan Nations.

descriptions: The New Order was formed by an individual with ties to Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: Dennis McGiffen, who also had ties to Aryan Nations, formed a group called 'The New Order', inspired by Mathews' group.

descriptions: The Order was formed by Aryan Nations members and had ties to the organization.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1983, Robert Jay Mathews, who had visited the Aryan Nations compound many times, formed The Order, along with Aryan Nations members Dan Bauer, Randy Duey, Denver Parmenter, and Bruce Pierce.

descriptions: Big Circle Gang lists Aryan Nations as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K Triad, Bloods, Piru Street Boys, Crips, East Side Longos, 211 Crew, Soldiers of Aryan Culture, Aryan Circle, Aryan Brotherhood, Nazi Lowriders, Aryan Nations, Lynwood Vikings

descriptions: Brother Speed purchased illegal weapons from Aryan Nations members.
edges.evidence_quote: The club has purchased illegal weapons from members of Aryan Nations in northern Idaho.

descriptions: Infobox lists Aryan Nations as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Nations, Bandidos MC, Black Pistons MC, Breed MC, Buffalo crime family, Chicago Outfit, Detroit Partnership, Grim Reapers MC, Gypsy Joker MC, Hammerskins, New Orleans crime family, Pittsburgh crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: The Outlaws are allied with the Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws are allied with the Bandidos, the Black Pistons, the Breed, the Grim Reapers, and the Gypsy Jokers motorcycle gangs, as well as the Aryan Nations and the Hammerskins

descriptions: SSMC claims to be the militant arm of Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: According to their official website, the club claims to be the "militant arm" of Aryan Nations.

descriptions: SSMC formally merged with Aryan Nations in July 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: In July 2012, SSMC formally merged with Aryan Nations.

edges.source: The Covenant, the Sword, and the Arm of the Lord
descriptions: CSA leader Ellison had close ties to Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: Ellison had close ties to the Ku Klux Klan and Aryan Nations

descriptions: The Order is affiliated with Aryan Nations according to the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Aryan Nations

descriptions: The Gianola brothers feuded with the Adamo gang over control of rackets.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 1912 and 1913, the Gianola brothers took over the Wyandotte area rackets gang starting a feud with Wyandotte Mafia boss Vito Adamo.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Historical: , Black Liberation Army , Symbionese Liberation Army , Weather Underground

descriptions: May 19th Communist Organization allied with Black Liberation Army to commit the Brink's robbery.
edges.evidence_quote: three former members, Kathy Boudin, Judith Alice Clark, and David Gilbert, joined the May 19 Communist Organization, and on October 20, 1981, in Nanuet, New York, the group helped the Black Liberation Army rob a Brink's armored truck

West End Gang.description: The West End Gang is a powerful criminal organization based in Montreal, Quebec, active since the early 1900s. It is recognized as part of the Irish mafia, with close ties to the Winter Hill Gang in Boston and alliances with the Rizzuto and Musitano crime families. The gang engages in theft, robbery, kidnapping, fraud, arms trafficking, and drug dealing, notably controlling cocaine and hashish distribution in the 1970s. It was part of the Consorzio, a drug cartel with Italian-Canadian families and Hells Angels. Current membership is estimated at 100-150, and the gang remains active under boss Gerald Matticks.

descriptions: The West End Gang is listed as an ally of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Commisso 'ndrina, Hells Angels MC, West End Gang

descriptions: The Dubois Brothers eliminated the Irish gang.
edges.evidence_quote: This allowed the Brothers to wipe out the rival Irish gang

descriptions: Hells Angels partnered with West End Gang in criminal operations.
edges.evidence_quote: The Canadian Hells Angels have partnered the Medellín Cartel, the Rizzuto crime family, the Sinaloa Cartel and the West End Gang in criminal operations.

descriptions: West End Gang and Hells Angels engaged in a financial arrangement involving debt forgiveness and payment.
edges.evidence_quote: Allan "the Weasel" Ross, the boss of the West End Gang, told the Hells Angels Yves Trudeau that he was willing to forgive the drug debts owned to him by the Halifax chapter in exchange for the Halifax chapter paying Trudeau money that Ross owned him.

descriptions: West End Gang allowed Hells Angels to smuggle goods through the Port of Montreal for fees.
edges.evidence_quote: Lekkes agreed to testify for the Crown that the West End Gang controlled the port of Montreal, and in exchange for fees, allowed the Angels to smuggle all sorts of things both in and out of Montreal.

descriptions: West End Gang is listed as an ally of Indian Posse in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: West End Gang

descriptions: Danny Wolfe of the Indian Posse befriended the boss of the West End Gang, leading to a profitable alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: While serving a prison sentence in 2003 and 2004, Danny Wolfe befriended Gerry Matticks, the imprisoned boss of the Irish-Canadian West End Gang of Montreal.

descriptions: The West End Gang is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rizzuto crime family, Independent Soldiers, West End Gang, Hells Angels, Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan, Various other crime families and gangs

descriptions: Rizzuto mediated peace with West End Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rizzuto was the mediator who oversaw the peace among the Hells Angels, the Mafia, street gangs, Colombian cartels, and the Irish mobs such as the West End Gang.

descriptions: Rizzuto family and West End Gang co-organized a cocaine shipment in 2005.
edges.evidence_quote: a 300 kilogram shipment of a total 1,300 kilograms of cocaine, co-organized by Rizzuto family confidant, Francesco Del Balso and West End Gang member, Richard Griffin, was intercepted

descriptions: Rock Machine member Cazzetta arranged a drug deal with West End Gang member Richard Matticks.
edges.evidence_quote: Cazzetta introduced the informer to Richard Matticks, the brother of Gerald Matticks of the West End Gang.

descriptions: Rock Machine founder Salvatore Cazzetta had contacts with the West End Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Cazzetta spoke fluent French, English and Italian and had contacts with the Rizzuto crime family, the West End Gang, and the Dubois Gang.

descriptions: West End Gang sided with Satan's Choice in the conflict against Popeyes.
edges.evidence_quote: The same underworld struggle drew in the Irish West End Gang on the side of Satan's Choice while the Dubois Brothers gang backed the Popeyes.

descriptions: West End Gang has ties to Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Since that time, the gang has formulated ties to the Montreal Mafia , the Cosa Nostra , the Hells Angels , and Colombian cartels.

descriptions: American Cosa Nostra supported the Consorzio's drug distribution.
edges.evidence_quote: con il supporto di Cosa Nostra americana e delle varie bande criminali degli Stati Uniti

descriptions: West End Gang partnered with Cali Cartel to transport cocaine.
edges.evidence_quote: Under Ross' leadership, the West End Gang formed a partnership with the Cali Cartel, transporting large quantitites of cocaine into Canada from the United States.

descriptions: The West End Gang partnered with the Cali Cartel to transport cocaine into Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: Under Ross' leadership, the West End Gang formed a partnership with the Cali Cartel, transporting large quantitites of cocaine into Canada from the United States.

descriptions: West End Gang and Cotroni family jointly committed a bank robbery.
edges.evidence_quote: the theft of some $20,000 in cash from the vault of the Brockville Trust & Saving Company in Brockville on 4 May 1958 was a joint operation of the West End Gang and the Cotroni family.

descriptions: West End Gang has ties to Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: Since that time, the gang has formulated ties to the Montreal Mafia , the Cosa Nostra , the Hells Angels , and Colombian cartels.

descriptions: West End Gang, Montreal Mafia, and Hells Angels form the Consortium to fix drug prices.
edges.evidence_quote: The three Montreal organizations (West End Gang, Montreal Mafia, Hells Angels) make up the 'Consortium'

descriptions: Members of the West End Gang and Hells Angels jointly assaulted a police officer in Mexico.
edges.evidence_quote: Led by Maloney who noticed the policeman taking the photographs, the Hells Angels and the West End Gang members proceed to beat the policeman bloody

descriptions: West End Gang formed the Consorzio with Hells Angels and Italian-Canadian families to jointly manage drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: la West End Gang strinse contatti con queste organizzazioni nascenti. Fu così che nacque il Consorzio , un cartello comune dove le famiglie italo-canadesi , gli Hells Angels e la West End Gang gestivano unite il traffico di droga

descriptions: West End Gang has ties to Montreal Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Since that time, the gang has formulated ties to the Montreal Mafia , the Cosa Nostra , the Hells Angels , and Colombian cartels.

descriptions: West End Gang, Montreal Mafia, and Hells Angels form the Consortium to fix drug prices.
edges.evidence_quote: The three Montreal organizations (West End Gang, Montreal Mafia, Hells Angels) make up the 'Consortium'

descriptions: The West End Gang collaborates with the Montreal Mafia on large drug shipments.
edges.evidence_quote: The group often collaborates with the Montreal Mafia and the Hells Angels in enormous drug shipments

descriptions: West End Gang is a close ally of the Musitano family.
edges.evidence_quote: e della famiglia Musitano dell' Ontario

descriptions: West End Gang is allied with Provisional IRA per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Provisional IRA

descriptions: West End Gang is allied with Rizzuto crime family per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Rizzuto crime family

descriptions: West End Gang is a close ally of the Rizzuto family.
edges.evidence_quote: Rimane stretta alleata della famiglia Rizzuto del Québec

descriptions: West End Gang is allied with Rock Machine MC per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Rock Machine MC

descriptions: West End Gang member Maloney helped the Sinaloa Cartel smuggle cocaine into Ontario.
edges.evidence_quote: Maloney worked as a member of the Wolfpack, but transferred his loyalty towards helping the Sinaloa Cartel in smuggling cocaine direct into Ontario.

descriptions: West End Gang has close contacts with Winter Hill Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: con stretti contatti la Winter Hill Gang di Boston

descriptions: Shane Maloney, a West End Gang leader, was a key member of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Maloney became a key member in the Wolfpack Alliance.

descriptions: Shane Maloney of the West End Gang was a key member of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: A key member of the Wolfpack was Shane Kenneth Maloney of the West End Gang which controls the Port of Montreal.

descriptions: West End Gang member Shane Maloney was part of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Other members of the Wolfpack Alliance were ... Shane Maloney of the Montreal's West End Gang

descriptions: West End Gang member Shane Maloney was a key Wolfpack leader, and the West End Gang controlled the Port of Montreal used for smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: A key member of the Wolfpack proved to be Shane Kenneth 'Wheels' Maloney of the West End Gang.

Lyons Crime Family.description: The Lyons Crime Family is an organised crime group based in Glasgow, Scotland, involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, extortion, and violence. Founded in the 1990s by Eddie Lyons Snr, the group has been engaged in a deadly feud with the Daniel Crime Family since 2001. The family operates in the UK, Spain, and the UAE, and has ties to the Kinahan Organized Crime Group.

descriptions: The Lyons Crime Family is listed as an ally of the Kinahan Organised Crime Group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Lyons Crime Family

descriptions: The Daniel clan and the Lyons Crime Family are involved in a violent vendetta.
edges.evidence_quote: Glasgow's crime families are often involved in violent feuds, as with the vendetta between the Daniel clan and the Lyons Crime Family .

descriptions: The Lyons and Daniel families have been in a deadly feud since 2001.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 2001, the Lyons family has been embroiled in a longstanding and deadly feud with another Glasgow-based crime family , the Daniel Crime Family.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Grendon Crime Family as a rival of the Lyons Crime Family.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Daniel Crime Family , Hutch Organized Crime Gang , Grendon Crime Family

descriptions: The infobox lists the Hutch Organized Crime Gang as a rival of the Lyons Crime Family.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Daniel Crime Family , Hutch Organized Crime Gang , Grendon Crime Family

descriptions: Steven Lyons, head of the Lyons Crime Family, has connections with the Kinahan Organized Crime Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Steven Lyons is also believed to have connections with the Dubai-based Kinahan Organized Crime Group .

descriptions: The Killeen Gang and the Mullen Gang were in conflict in the early 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1970s, another mob war was taking place in South Boston between two other Irish-American gangs: the Killeen Gang... and the Mullen Gang...

descriptions: The Killeen Gang and Mullen Gang were consolidated under the control of the Winter Hill Gang in 1972.
edges.evidence_quote: After a sit-down at Chandler's restaurant in the South End, Boston, the two gangs joined forces with Winter as overall boss.

descriptions: The Mullen Gang and Killeen Gang fought a gang war for control of South Boston rackets.
edges.evidence_quote: After a decade-long gang war against another Irish mob group, the Killeen Gang, for control of criminal rackets in South Boston, both gangs were consolidated under the control of the Winter Hill Gang in 1972.

descriptions: The Winter Hill Gang absorbed the remnants of the Killeen Gang after Donald Killeen was murdered.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1970s, another mob war was taking place in South Boston between two other Irish-American gangs: the Killeen Gang... and the Mullen Gang...

descriptions: Winter Hill Gang absorbed the remnants of the Killeen Gang after a gang war.
edges.evidence_quote: absorbing the remnants of the Mullen and Killeen gangs of South Boston

descriptions: Winter Hill Gang absorbed the remnants of the Killeen Gang after gang wars.
edges.evidence_quote: absorbing the remnants of the Mullen and Killeen gangs of South Boston following a series of Irish gang wars

descriptions: Winter Hill Gang absorbed the remnants of the Killeen Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: then absorbing the remnants of the Mullen and Killeen gangs of South Boston following a series of Irish gang wars

descriptions: Winter Hill Gang absorbed remnants of the Killeen Gang after conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: absorbing the remnants of the Mullen and Killeen gangs of South Boston

Sons of Silence.description: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in Niwot, Colorado in 1966 by Bruce Gale Richardson. Designated a criminal organization by the U.S. Department of Justice. Has over 250 members with 35 chapters in 12 U.S. states and Germany. Sixth-largest motorcycle club worldwide.

descriptions: Sons of Silence is a smaller motorcycle gang allied with Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels are allied with numerous smaller motorcycle gangs – such as the ... Sons of Silence

descriptions: Infobox lists Sons of Silence as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sons of Silence

descriptions: Infobox lists Sons of Silence MC as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Devils Diciples MC, Diablos MC, El Forastero MC, Galloping Goose MC, Hells Angels MC, Highwaymen MC, Iron Horsemen MC, Loners MC, Mongols MC, Pagans MC, Red Devils MC, Sons of Silence MC, Warlocks MC

descriptions: The Sons of Silence are a rival biker gang of the Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: Rival biker gangs of the Outlaws include the Devils Diciples, the Diablos, El Forastero, the Galloping Goose, the Hells Angels, the Highwaymen, the Iron Horsemen, the Mongols, the Pagans, the Sons of Silence

descriptions: Sons of Silence members attacked a Bad 7 member, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: Sons of Silence members... pleaded guilty to charges stemming from an incident at a bar in Rock Springs in which they beat and robbed Bradley Chrisman, a member of the rival Bad 7 motorcycle club, of his colors on April 10, 2017.

descriptions: Sons of Silence obtained a mobile drug lab from the wife of Barhoppers president.
edges.evidence_quote: a mobile drug lab obtained from Cecelia Martinez – wife of the imprisoned Barhoppers Motorcycle Club president Glen Gary

descriptions: Sons of Silence had a power struggle with Dead Men in 1972.
edges.evidence_quote: the brawl involved a total of twenty-two participants and was the result of a power struggle between the Sons of Silence and two other motorcycle clubs, the Dead Men and a group known as Philtown.

descriptions: Sons of Silence had a turf war with Diablos Lobos in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: A Sons of Silence member was charged with the murder of a member of the Diablos Lobos gang who was killed in an Aurora bar amidst a turf war involving the groups in 1983.

descriptions: Sons of Silence and Diablos cooperate as primary meth wholesalers in Vigo County.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sons of Silence, along with the Diablos, are the primary wholesalers of methamphetamine in Vigo County

descriptions: The text states a feud between the two clubs.
edges.evidence_quote: A fire at a home in Fargo on October 31, 2019 was connected to a feud between the Sons of Silence and Hells Angels, according to law enforcement.

descriptions: Sons of Silence formed an alliance with Hells Angels to expand.
edges.evidence_quote: an alliance with the Hells Angels enabled the Sons of Silence to further expand.

descriptions: Sons of Silence is allied with Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The club is allied with the Hells Angels and the Iron Horsemen

descriptions: Sons of Silence had a bar fight and shootings with Invaders.
edges.evidence_quote: Another bar fight involving the Sons of Silence and the Invaders motorcycle gang at a Denver tavern resulted in a series of sporadic shootings.

descriptions: Sons of Silence is allied with Iron Horsemen.
edges.evidence_quote: The club is allied with the Hells Angels and the Iron Horsemen

descriptions: Members of both clubs traveled together, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: While travelling to an annual motorcycle rally in Sturgis, South Dakota on August 5, 1997, seven Sons of Silence and Iron Horsemen members were stopped by South Dakota Highway Patrol troopers...

descriptions: Sons of Silence had a physical conflict with Iron Order Motorcycle Club in 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: Sons of Silence members had a conflict with members of the Iron Order Motorcycle Club in a business parking lot in Crawfordsville on April 27, 2014.

descriptions: Sons of Silence is a rival of the Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: and is a rival of the Outlaws.

descriptions: A war erupted between Sons of Silence and Outlaws in Indianapolis in late 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: a war erupted following the July 1978 near-fatal stabbing of Outlaws member Dale "Dummy" Larque during a bar fight on the city's Westside.

descriptions: Violent clash between members of the two clubs.
edges.evidence_quote: A Sons of Silence member shot an Outlaws member in a bar fight in which two other Sons of Silence bikers were stabbed in Sturgis in August 1990.

descriptions: Tahrir al-Sham is the main rival and former ally of Ahrar al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: Ahrar al-Sham is not to be confused with Tahrir al-Sham, its main rival and former ally.

descriptions: Ahrar al-Sham fought against Tahrir al-Sham from 2017 onward.
edges.evidence_quote: From 2017 onward, it increasingly fought against Tahrir al-Sham

descriptions: Tahrir al-Sham is listed as an opponent (sometimes) in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Hay'at Tahrir al-Sham ( sometimes )

descriptions: Tahrir al-Sham is the main rival of Ahrar al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: While both are major rebel groups, Ahrar al-Sham is not to be confused with Tahrir al-Sham, its main rival and former ally.

descriptions: After the merger, Al-Nusra loyalists clashed with HTS.
edges.evidence_quote: Mutual hostility progressively deteriorated into violent confrontations, with Al-Nusra commander Sami al-Oraydi accusing HTS of adopting nationalist doctrines

descriptions: JFS merged into HTS in 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Jabhat Fatah Al-Sham (JFS) merged with four other groups to form Hayat Tahrir Al-Sham (HTS)

descriptions: Jabhat Fatah Al-Sham merged into Hay'at Tahrir Al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: On 28 January 2017, several Salafi jihadist groups, including Jabhat Fatah Al-Sham, agreed upon a merger agreement, resulting in the formation of a new group called Hay'at Tahrir Al-Sham.

descriptions: Hay'at Tahrir Al-Sham is the successor organization to Al-Nusra.
edges.evidence_quote: Hay'at Tahrir Al-Sham wounded militants were receiving treatment in Israel.

descriptions: Hay'at Tahrir al-Sham is listed as an opponent of Islamic State.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Hay'at Tahrir al-Sham

descriptions: Islamic State and Tahrir al-Sham were in conflict, resulting in the death of an IS leader.
edges.evidence_quote: the Islamic State claimed that al-Husseini al-Qurashi was killed in a shootout with Tahrir al-Sham (HTS) forces.

descriptions: Abu Amara Brigades is a faction within Hay'at Tahrir Al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: the Israeli Mossad assassinated the Syrian scientist, Aziz Azbar, with the assistance of Abu Amara Brigades, which is a faction within Hay'at Tahrir Al-Sham.

descriptions: Hay'at Tahrir al-Sham was an ally of the Taliban until January 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies ... Hay'at Tahrir al-Sham ( until January 2025 )

descriptions: Infobox lists Tahrir al-Sham as an opponent of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: List: Tahrir al-Sham

descriptions: Los Malcriados 3AD is listed as an ally of La Unión Tepito in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Kilos , Los Tanzanios , Los Malcriados 3AD

descriptions: Billy Hill's organisation succeeded Sabinis after the White family.
edges.evidence_quote: his empire was taken over by the White family led by Alf White and subsequently by the organisations of Jack Spot and Billy Hill

descriptions: Al-Qassam Brigades is the armed wing of Hamas.
edges.evidence_quote: The Islamic Resistance Movement , abbreviated Hamas ... is a Sunni Islamist Palestinian nationalist political organisation with a military wing known as the al-Qassam Brigades.

descriptions: Al-Qassam Brigades is the military wing of Hamas.
edges.evidence_quote: The Islamic Resistance Movement , abbreviated Hamas ... with a military wing known as the al-Qassam Brigades.

edges.source: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine
edges.target: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine – General Command
descriptions: PFLP-GC split from PFLP.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 1968, Ahmed Jibril led a break away from the PFLP to form the Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine – General Command (PFLP-GC), and was joined by Ahmed Zarur and his followers.

edges.source: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine – General Command
descriptions: Arab Palestine Organisation split from PFLP-GC.
edges.evidence_quote: Zarur later split from the PFLP-GC to form the Arab Palestine Organisation.

descriptions: Charles Polizzi, a member of the Cleveland Syndicate, was the adopted brother of Alfred Polizzi, head of the Mayfield Road Mob, indicating a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Charles Polizzi the adopted brother of Alfred Polizzi, head of the Italian Mayfield Road Mob.

descriptions: The Cleveland Syndicate and Mayfield Road Mob were connected through family ties.
edges.evidence_quote: Charles Polizzi was born Leo Berkowitz ... his adoptive brother, Alfred Polizzi , was the head of the Italian Mayfield Road Mob .

descriptions: The Mayfield Road Mob evolved into the Cleveland crime family under Frank Milano.
edges.evidence_quote: Frank Milano and the Mayfield Road Mob gradually replaced the Porrello brothers as the Cleveland area's premier Mafia group, with Milano becoming the official boss of the Cleveland family.

descriptions: The Celtic Club (Greene) backed John Nardi's faction against the Licavoli faction of Mayfield Road Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: Open warfare broke out between the Licavoli and Nardi factions. Greene backed John Nardi 's claim.

descriptions: Mayfield Road Mob employed Danny Greene, leader of The Celtic Club, as muscle.
edges.evidence_quote: Also, Mayfield Road Mob underboss, Frank 'Little Frank' Brancato employed Greene as muscle for the city's garbage rackets.

Rollin' 60s Neighborhood Crips.description: The Rollin' 60s Neighborhood Crips is a set of the Crips street gang alliance based in Los Angeles, California, founded in 1976 from the Westside Crips. It is one of the largest gangs in the Los Angeles area with an estimated 1,600 members. The gang is involved in racketeering, murder, drug trafficking, and other crimes, and has spread to other U.S. cities.

descriptions: Rollin' 60s has Bloods as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bloods , "Hoover factions", "Eight Trey Gangster Crip (83GC)"

descriptions: Rollin' 60s is a subset of the Crips alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rollin' 60s Neighborhood Crips is a " set " of the Crips street gang alliance

descriptions: Rollin' 60s is allied with Rollin' 40's NHC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rollin 40's and Rollin 90's NHCs

descriptions: Rollin' 60s is allied with Rollin' 90's NHC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rollin 40's and Rollin 90's NHCs

descriptions: The Roosevelt, Long Island set of Rollin' 60s feuded with Roosevelt Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: This set had been established in 2003 and was responsible for dozens of shootings over the years as part of a feud with the Roosevelt Bloods gang.

descriptions: Rollin' 60s formed from the Westside Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: originally formed around Hyde Park, Los Angeles , in 1976 from the Westside Crips

descriptions: Rollin' 90s and Rollin' 60s formed an alliance in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: the two gangs decided to unite, and this alliance has since spread to other gangs, including the Rollin' 40s Crips

descriptions: Rollin' 90s branched off from Rollin' 60s.
edges.evidence_quote: the Rollin' 90s Crips branched off from the Rollin' 60s Crips

descriptions: Omar Ghazi Group joined ISIS–K.
edges.evidence_quote: Notable among these are the Omar Ghazi Group, Shamali Khilafat, Gansu Hui Group, Harakat Khilafat Baluch, Jaysh ul Islam, Mullah Bakhtwar's group, the Shamsatoo group, and radical student groups in Pakistan and eastern Afghanistan.

descriptions: CT is described as one of 67's main rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Cheyon Evans was known as 'Stompz' and allegedly was a part of the 37/OJB gang, with him also having ties to the CT gang based in Clapham, one of 67's main rivals.

descriptions: Independent Soldiers had a rivalry with Game Tight Soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: which led to a rivalry with the Game Tight Soldiers.

descriptions: Luongo-D'Amico is a splinter of Mazzarella and allied with them against Vollaro.
edges.evidence_quote: con i Luongo-D'Amico (costola degli stessi Mazzarella operante a San Giorgio a Cremano) per la faida con i Vollaro

descriptions: D'Amico-Luongo is an articulation of Mazzarella.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 22 gennaio 2020 vengono arrestate 34 persone tra San Giorgio a Cremano, Napoli e Portici del clan D'Amico-Luongo, ritenuto un’articolazione del clan Mazzarella.

descriptions: The Luongo-D'Amico clan is a faction of the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: San Giorgio a Cremano e Portici: fazione di stanza nel territorio vesuviano facente capo alla costola del clan Mazzarella, Luongo-D'Amico.

descriptions: Luongo-D'Amico is an articulation (branch) of Mazzarella.
edges.evidence_quote: si è creata una costola o per meglio dire un'articolazione del clan Mazzarella nei territori di San Giorgio a Cremano e Portici, i Luongo-D'Amico
